name: Orange Snowballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the vanilla wafer crumbs and melted margarine in a large bowl.
2. Add 1 cup of powdered sugar and nuts to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Incorporate the frozen orange juice concentrate and mix until well blended.
4. Gradually add softened margarine and enough milk to achieve a spreading consistency.
5. Form small balls with the mixture using your hands or a cookie scoop.
6. Roll each snowball in shredded coconut meat until evenly coated.
7. Place the snowballs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Let them dry completely at room temperature for several hours, then store in an airtight container.
9. The confection will improve in flavor and texture after several days of storage.
Yield: Approximately 3 1/2 dozen orange snowballs
